title: limonium articulatum subsp. pseudarticulatum
intro: Limonium articulatum subsp. pseudarticulatum, also known as Purple Sea Lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Purple Sea Lavender include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from sore muscles and joints. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
